# calendar.view.MainContainerModel: activeCalendarId data property

`Neo.calendar.view.calendars.List: onSelect()` needs to update the model prop, `Neo.calendar.view.week.Component: onColumnDragStart()` needs to assign the selected calendar id to new events.
